posts.text:
Epstein-Maxxing in the front row is wild 🤷‍♂️

Faces blurred so Comedy Cellar doesn’t get sued. I’ll prolly get sued or worse…

That being said… I am not feeling self deletey. I eat healthy food (not really). The brakes on my Ubers and Subways are in good shape (I think). I practice good trigger discipline and never point a gun at anyone, including myself (I don’t have a gun). There are no deep pools of water in my apartment and I’m a pretty good swimmer.
